response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and frameworks, with a strong track record of building scalable systems, optimizing performance, and delivering user-focused solutions. His recent work in AI-agent infrastructure and TypeScript/Node.js aligns well with the role's primary stack, and his contributions to open-source projects and architecture decisions highlight both technical depth and breadth.
strengths: Deep full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js and React, matching primary stack requirements
Proven track record in scaling systems (handling millions of requests at Dunnhumby) and optimizing performance
Strong architecture and engineering mindset, with contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and Kubernetes deployment
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js (primary stack requirement), though demonstrates proficiency in similar frameworks like Node.js and Express
No explicit mention of Kotlin/Java for backend services (secondary stack), though Java experience is noted in earlier roles
Overlap of diverse stack experience may indicate lack of deep specialization in required primary technologies

key_factors.factor: Relevant full-stack experience and stack alignment
Narrowing expertise to primary stack (Nest.js, Kotlin/Java)
